//: Lighthouse CI config (SPEC §23 / plan §6 t8-e5-perf). Measures the COLD
//2: SPA boot of the app served by a WARM mock server, under a 4x CPU throttle.
//3: `interactive` (Time-to-Interactive) is the cold-to-inbox proxy: it captures
//4: the SolidJS boot + first-interactive cost that dominates cold-to-inbox; the
//5: post-auth inbox is one JMAP fetch against the already-warm backend. Login is
//6: owned by a peer executor (Login.tsx) and actively changing, so this gate
//7: does NOT couple to its selectors; enable authenticated inbox measurement by
//8: adding a puppeteerScript once that UI settles (see perf.yml comment).
//9: Anti-flake: median of 5 runs; enforcement is fail-on-regression per
//10: 'measured not asserted' — flip the `interactive` assertion to 'warn' for an
//11: initial trend-only soft-launch window if needed.
